economic_notes: Nation operates multiple business enterprises including Songhees Development Corporation, Songhees Development Limited Partnership, S&S Victoria LP, S&S Bay Center LP, Skungeenes Holdings LLP, 1185869 B.C. Ltd, 1255063 B.C. Ltd. Business activities include events/catering, tours, seafood, and real estate partnerships.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Province is BC. Consolidated entity includes Songhees James Bay Village Trust, Songhees Cadboro Bay Trust, and Songhees Cadboro Bay Settlement Minors Trust. Seven entities accounted for under modified equity method (GBEs). Health and Social Services combined as one segment ($2,043,898); social component not separately broken out. Local Services expenses $4,070,723 and Community Services $1,587,821 not mapped to standard categories. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC + FNHA + Province of BC + CMHC + Other government funding = 6001689+1676331+5749416+38528+1140597 = 14606561; FNGST $1,940,243 also included bringing total to 15,606,459 if FNGST treated as government transfer. OSR calculated accordingly. Remuneration schedule not included in provided text. Accumulated surplus includes remeasurement losses of $2,041,288.
